question: What's the best budget laptop for students under $500?
title: What's the best Laptops to buy in 2026?
body: After testing dozens of products in this category, I think ASUS VivoBook 15 OLED is one of the best options right now. Stunning OLED display at budget price. AMD Ryzen 7 processor. Pros: • Beautiful OLED screen • Ryzen 7 multi-core performance • Full-size keyboard with numpad Cons: • Plastic build quality • Average battery life Price: $429 Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3/5 (3.2K+ reviews) Full review here: https://mree9527.github.io/liuliangrukou/money-engine/output/reviews/B0BS4C7M5V-review.html (Disclosure: affiliate link - no extra cost to you)
